subcodes.first_line: O blessed Leaf! Thy letter was received. Thou hast ever been before Mine eyes and encompassed by loving-kindness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه مبارکه نامه شما رسید همیشه منظور نظر بوده اید و مشمول بمهربانی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @growth of the Cause, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
